value_chain_position: Healthcare revenue cycle management and payments platform; sits between payers (insurers), providers (hospitals/clinics), and patients handling claim submission, remittance and patient payment collection.
relative_comps: Waystar's 25% FCF margin at $1.2B revenue marks it as an asset-light software rail in a sticky vertical; 16% CAGR and 19% YoY are solid for healthcare IT. Competitors include Netsmart, HealthStream, and legacy clearinghouse operators; Waystar's cloud-native architecture gives it a modernization edge over older clearinghouse incumbents. Net leverage near zero post-IPO is a balance-sheet positive. The main risk is concentration — healthcare payers control reimbursement rules and could vertically integrate parts of the workflow.
